File: /Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-inspector.test.tsx

Failing tests:
- EntityInspector > renders fields from schema in section order (header, body)
- EntityInspector > groups fields into header and body sections
- EntityInspector > renders markdown fields via Field (click enters edit mode)
- EntityInspector > allows editing computed tag fields via multi-select
- EntityInspector > body_field renders #tag as a styled pill when tag entity exists
- EntityInspector > non-body markdown fields do NOT get tag pills
- EntityInspector > first visible field has data-focused attribute by default
- EntityInspector > only one field has data-focused at a time
Fix failing tests: EntityInspector - field rendering, sections, markdown, tag pills, focus (8 tests)
